block_00: Take a look at the new communication opportunities!
block_01: We’ve got you covered with our new communication channels!
block_03: In constant search of the most effective ways of keeping you updated, we would like to tailor our communication in the most convenient way for YOU.
block_04: Currently in progress, we are trying our best to develop an IQ Option communication channel in Whatsapp.
block_05: Currently in progress, we are trying our best to develop an IQ Option communication channel in LINE.
block_06: As we strive to keep you informed about all the latest news, we would like for you to let us know, what is best for you?
block_07: Your opinion is very important to us! Please click the button below to fill out a short form with your preferences.
block_09: Thank you for your continued support of IQ Option.
